title: [security] EDHOC zeroization, poison() gaps, timing leaks in edhoc.rs
description: Reviewed commits e94753c30 (edhoc.rs:327-1511+), cda09e846, b3705f1b0 + meta bd commits. Findings: missing Zeroizing/SecretVec on MAC/keystream (lines ~694,758,1160,1242), inconsistent poison() on msg1 parse errors (1098-1120) allowing key reuse, non-CT error paths/timing on verify/MIC (755-929,1118), seed handling in Responder::new (1034), partial state before validation. Affects key handling, OSCORE export, EDHOC handshake. No Schnorr changes. See explore task ses_07058325affe7kkA6A6QHEX2SZ for full details. P0.
